goal:
PROBLEM: gad-tui layout reflows dramatically + content jumbles when cycling panes via ctrl+n. Operator quote 2026-04-22: 'the UI also shifts dramatically when doing a ctrl+n and jumbles up. the actual transcript/header and etc space just isnt as wide as the status bar, the chat input and etc just need to be wider I think.'

REPRO: launch gad tui in any sufficiently-wide terminal. ctrl+n to cycle panes. Notice: status bar (full width) vs transcript/header/chat-input (narrower). Layout shifts on each pane switch instead of staying stable.

ROOT CAUSE HYPOTHESES (verify in code):
(1) Inner column widths use a stale/initial-mount terminal width vs a recomputed one. Width recomputed on resize event but not on pane switch.
(2) Flex/grid template biased toward one child — sidebar or status pane stealing horizontal space from main column.
(3) Different panes use different layout templates — switching to a 'narrow content' pane shrinks the outer frame's child constraints.
(4) Border / padding accounting wrong: status bar excludes padding, content includes (or vice versa) → off-by-N visible.

FIX SCOPE:
(1) Inspect packages/gad-tui/src/layout (or wherever the root layout lives — find via grep 'transcript\|chat-input\|status-bar' in src).
(2) Make the layout invariant: outer frame fixed to terminal width, status bar and main column share the same width, chat input fills main column width.
(3) Recompute layout on pane switch (not just terminal resize). Or use a layout primitive (Ink Box with width='100%') that handles it.
(4) Check that ctrl+n pane switch isn't unmounting + remounting the layout root (would re-init children with wrong sizes).

EDGE CASES:
- Terminal width changes during session: layout must reflow without jumble (existing behavior for resize).
- Very narrow terminal (<80 cols): collapse to single-column layout vs jumbling.
- Pane with optional sidebar (e.g. fleet view): sidebar should overlay or split, not shift outer frame.
- Tasks panel + chat panel different heights: don't let one steal the other's vertical space mid-cycle.

ACCEPTANCE:
- Status bar, header, transcript, chat input ALL at the same width as the outer terminal frame (modulo intentional padding).
- ctrl+n cycling produces a stable layout — only the active-pane indicator changes, not the column widths.
- Operator stops noticing layout jumble.

REFERENCES:
- ERRORS: gad-tui-ctrl-n-layout-shift-2026-04-22 (will add this turn)
- Likely files: packages/gad-tui/src/components/, packages/gad-tui/src/layout/ (verify with grep)
